source: Benton County criminal division attorney verification memo
memo_scope: Counsel and status checks requested before docket entry for the 2025-06-20 plea docket.

verifications.status_note: The case was open before the hearing. Theresa Walsh appears on the live case caption but is not the attorney of record after the substitution order accepted at the hearing.
verifications.review_note: Route the attorney change to a supervisor because the caption and appearance do not match.

verifications.status_note: The warrant was recalled on the record. No attorney update is needed.
verifications.review_note: No supervisor routing requested after the recall entry is prepared.

verifications.status_note: The warrant recall is new. The older ledger batch is known to contain obsolete criminal assessment rows.
verifications.review_note: Supervisor review requested for the replacement financial entry on the older case.

verifications.status_note: The stale roster shows a pending case status, and the live caption still shows retained representation. Grant appeared from the County Public Defender Office.
verifications.review_note: Route the representation correction and warrant recall for supervisor review.
